commands.title: Saropa Lints: Open Saropa Project Map Dashboard
Saropa Lints: Toggle Saropa Project Map Heat CodeLens (in-editor)

saropaLints.projectMap.codeLensHeat.description: Show per-function complexity 'heat' as in-editor CodeLens above functions (from the last Saropa Project Map scan). Off by default to avoid clutter; toggle with 'Saropa Lints: Toggle Saropa Project Map Heat CodeLens'.
